title: dasygrammitis malaccana
intro: Dasygrammitis malaccana, also known as the Malacca daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Dasygrammitis malaccana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
